name: Peruvian Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Early in the day, wash and cook potatoes in boiling water for about 30 minutes or until tender. Drain, peel, and cut into 1/4"-thick slivers. Cool and refrigerate.
2. About half an hour before serving, shell eggs and cut them in half. Remove yolks and chop the whites; set aside.
3. In a small bowl, mash the egg yolks. Add cottage cheese, red pepper, Tabasco, pepper, seasoned salt, salt, and heavy cream. Beat with an electric mixer until smooth.
4. Gradually add olive oil while continuing to beat. Blend in onion and parsley.
5. Arrange lettuce leaves around the sides of a large serving plate or platter. Heap potato slices in the center and spread with the cheese salad dressing, covering the potatoes completely.
6. Garnish with chopped egg whites, olives, and parsley sprigs.
